										Health-care system in Canada key concern ahead of premiers meeting									
								
								
									
										Recent issues with the health-care system in Canada are proving to be a hot topic for the premiers ahead of Monday’s meeting of the Council of the Federation in Victoria. Legislative bureau chief Keith Baldrey breaks down what he expects from this get-together of provincial leaders.
